Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8016 "ARTILLERYDUEL-0B00-8016" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $0b00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Artillery Duel.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0B00 to set correct border colour (light blue) before starting game.
